'''Jabor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where [[Ferus Olin]] worked for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Ferus sent double agent [[Clive Flax]] undercover into the local [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base, thus disrupting a spy ring that had taken root throughout the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Its subsequent destruction saved many lives.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Abyss]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Abyss (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
